title: Kidplokio 15pc Space Toys Explorer Voyager Backpack Light Up Astronaut, 10 Inch
description:
These rugged scope levels attach directly to your scope tube without having to removing your scope. The ACCU/LEVEL can be used for right or left-handed shooters and is installed in minutes. The ACCU/LEVEL system aids in the correction of "cant error" giving you a dead on true vertical hold. The Articulating level can be used flipped out to the side or folded in positioned on top of the scope body and is held in place by a dual position detent to make sure your locked in before making that critical shot. LEVEL WHATEVER FIELD YOU'RE PLAYING ON Flatline Ops fitting 30mm scope diameters, will keep you locked in and on target

Kidplokio 15pc Space Toys Explorer Voyager Backpack Light Up Astronaut, 10 Inch

Prepare for lift off, we’re headed for new intergalactic heights of pretend play fun with Kidplokio’s 15pc Space Toys Explorer Backpack! This awesome space toys backpack easily converts to a space station with stickers and lots of fun space themed accessories, including a light up astronaut.

Key Features

  • SPACE TOYS BACKPACK: Blast off to new heights of interstellar playtime with Kidplokio’s Space Toys Explorer Backpack; designed with little astronauts in mind, this toy easily transforms from a hardcase backpack into a space station playset, meaning playtime can happen at home or on the go!
  • LIGHT-UP ASTRONAUT: This captivating space toys playset comes with a fun light-up astronaut and lots of other fun space-themed accessories, like a car, telescope, rocket, satellite, stickers, and more, each designed with vibrant, space-inspired graphics
  • BUILT FOR ADVENTURE: The space toys explorer backpack is durable, water resistant and easy to clean; the backpack comes with adjustable straps to convert it to a backpack, or it can be carried via the pop-up handle as a toy carrier, making it great for travel and playdates
  • TACTILE TOYS: Launch their imagination to new intergalactic levels with this hands-on space toys playset; sparking curiosity about space, astronomy, and other related fields, kids will love using their imagination, while it encourages them to engage in screen-free, active playtime with friends or family
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 10.5 x 10 x 5.5 inches; Weight: 1.32lbs; Note: Batteries included

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KPL-ZVU2QGC5
  • UPC: 885189864564

With its dazzling stars, rocket ships and planetary patterns, the Space Explorer Backpack inspires wonder and excitement! The unique design is perfect for young astronauts dreaming of adventures beyond the stars. Featuring a hard case exterior, the backpack is easy to keep clean and will stand up to lots of wear and tear, dodging meteorites and intergalactic villains of course! The space-themed backpack comes with adjustable straps for playtime on the go, or it can be carried via the pop-up handle as a toy carrier, making it great for travel and play dates. And lastly, the large interior bottom compartment keeps all toys and accessories organized and together for their next adventure, and ensures no pieces are lost along the way.

We love this space toys voyager backpack because it encourages little astronauts to engage in hands-on, screen-free playtime; sparking curiosity about space, astronomy, science, and other related fields, kids will love using their imagination, while it encourages them to engage in active and imaginative playtime with friends and family. The Kidplokio 15pc Space Toys Explorer Backpack isn’t just a backpack, it’s a gateway to a universe of fun and exploration! Perfect for school, playdates, and everyday outer galaxy adventures, it’s the ideal companion for any young space enthusiast ready to reach for the stars.
